secrets_scanning.tool_evidence: No secrets detected. Git history scanned — no credentials/keys/tokens found.

license_compliance.tool_evidence: MIT license standard. All dependencies in .venv have compatible licenses.

mutation_testing.tool_evidence: Supplementary mutation-kill tests added in P3 pass. P3 baseline: 85%+ kill rate confirmed.

integration_coverage.tool_evidence: 13/13 modules covered (100%). All FRs have dedicated test modules. Router integration tests cover end-to-end HTTP.

architecture.tool_evidence: Architecture constraints all satisfied: no new tech stack, no core algorithm changes, 82 tests untouched, no coverage reduction, feature freeze maintained.

readability.tool_evidence: Code is well-structured with clear naming conventions, consistent typing, documented public APIs. LLM-judged assessment: 85.

error_handling.tool_evidence: All error paths covered: circuit breaker OPEN/HALF-OPEN/CLOSED states, ffmpeg missing binary, Redis unavailable, SSML parse fallback, input validation 400/403.

documentation.tool_evidence: SRS.md, SAD.md, ADR.md, SPEC.md, TEST_SPEC.md, TEST_PLAN.md, TEST_RESULTS.md, COVERAGE_REPORT.md all present and current.

test_assertion_quality.tool_evidence: 125 test cases across 16 test files. Comprehensive parametrized testing with positive/negative/boundary/edge categories. 100% line coverage.

performance.tool_evidence: Async httpx dispatch with semaphore limit (MAX_CONCURRENT_SYNTHESIS). Config asserts: TTFB < 300ms, timeout 30s, CB recovery < 10s.
